name: Trevor Belmont [#] Blank Batch
description:
Blank Trevor Belmont cause he's funny

Love a sassy bitchy man lmao

I like so many characters it's hard to keep track and make new ones every time so I just make detailed personalities for blank bots that I can do whatever with whenever forever

I decided to publish my blank bots since I'm so proud of how they act on character even with JLLM which is what I use
creator: Lovely_Me
